description_long: This street cabinet is a large, rectangular, industrial enclosure with a robust metal construction, featuring a two-door front panel. The front is distinguished by a blue upper section with the label 'VAX 11/780' and a series of control switches and indicator lights, suggesting it houses electronic or computing equipment. The main body is light gray, with prominent horizontal ventilation grilles on both doors for airflow and cooling. The sides and rear are plain, solid panels without any visible openings or features, emphasizing security and durability. The cabinet stands on small black feet, slightly elevating it from the ground. Its overall appearance is utilitarian, designed for secure, weather-resistant housing of sensitive equipment in urban or industrial environments.
description: A large, robust metal street cabinet with a blue-labeled top, dual front doors, ventilation grilles, and control switches, designed for secure housing of electronic equipment.
description_view_0: Front view showing dual doors, blue-labeled top panel, ventilation grilles, and control switches.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain, solid panel with no visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a featureless, solid panel with a blue top section.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying a plain, solid panel identical to the left side.
